what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata stub for an image asset named "image (14)" in the design-assets channel under the diagrams path; it records the blob reference, MIME type, authorship, timestamps, and version, but contains no body content or code symbols.
observations: YAML frontmatter only with no body text
MIME is image/png but width and height are both 0
Version is 1 with identical created and updated timestamps
standouts: Empty alt text on a design asset
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata
References content by immutable blob URI
Includes version history block with author session and timestamps
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing image analysis or extraction failure
Empty alt text limits accessibility and searchability
Filename is generic and gives no semantic hint about the diagram's content
No links or context indicate how the asset is used
notes: A bare, addressable metadata shell for a diagram image that still needs dimensions, alt text, and usage relationships.
questions: What diagram or design does this image actually depict?
Why is the alt text empty?
Which other files or concepts reference this asset?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an image asset in the ledger; the actual content is only a metadata shell with no dimensions, description, or relationships, so it is incomplete as an asset record.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a diagram image into the channel memory ledger so it can be versioned, addressed, and referenced by other records.
contribution: Provides a persistent, addressable metadata record that links a named image blob to a channel and path, which a fused system can retain and enrich once dimensions, alt text, and relationships are reconciled.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown ledger stub recording metadata for an image/png asset named "image (14)" in the design-assets/diagrams channel, referencing a blob, with zero dimensions, empty alt text, version 1, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a diagram image asset for versioned reference within the design-assets channel.
